## Seminar 7: Calibration training  {#calibration_seminar} 
<!-- reference with [Calibration training](#calibration_seminar) -->

Welcome to the 7th seminar of **Decision Analysis and Forecasting for Agricultural Development**. This week you will take part in a calibration training an learn how to make reliable expert estimates.

Your work for this this seminar is to bring a laptop or mobile phone to the seminar with which you have an internet connection in the lecture hall. You will go through the training or your own device.

After this session please consider the inputs that will be necessary for your own model and prepare the input table and formulate questions for eliciting calibrated estimates from your colleagues and/or any experts that you have identified for your team's model.


### Group discussion - food for thought

1. What do you think about the idea of taking estimates as values for the impact models?

2. How did you feel during the training? What are your personal learnings from today's seminar?

3. What do you think about the method of calibration training as presented? Do you have suggestions how to change or improve it?

### After the class

If you want to continue calibration training after the seminar visit [our app](https://agtools.app/calibration_app/).
